# Arab Formation

**Summary**: A major carbonate reservoir in the Ghawar field.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] applied the proposed method to the Arab formation of Saudi Arabia.

- [[2024-felemban|Felemban, 2024]] analyzed the Arab formation at a depth of 1290 m.

## Depositional Environment



- [[2024-felemban|Felemban, 2024]] analyzed the Arab formation at a depth of 1290 m.

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2016-ali|Ali, 2016]] porosity 10-30%

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation was modeled with a porosity range of 10-30% and high potential for oil/gas. ([[2016-ali|Ali, 2016, p. 71]])

- The maximum offset to avoid phase change for Arab was determined to be 2,090 m. ([[2024-felemban|Felemban, 2024, p. 59]])
